summary: Iteration 112: Sacred Scriptures & Lost Books Feature - All backend tests passed (29/29). Frontend fully verified: Bible page loads, 7 category filters work, search works, book cards clickable, chapter reader with AI-generated content, TTS, bookmarks, AI Q&A chat all functional. Navigation has Sacred Scriptures link under Explore menu.

minor.issue: Previously cached Ruth chapter 1 has empty key_verses and commentary (data issue from development, not code bug). Fresh generations work correctly.

seed_data_creation: None - chapters are generated on-demand via AI and cached in 'bible_chapters' MongoDB collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sacred Scriptures feature fully implemented with 136 texts across 7 categories. Backend endpoints: GET /api/bible/categories (7 categories), GET /api/bible/books (136 books, supports ?category filter), GET /api/bible/books/{book_id} (book detail with chapter_list), POST /api/bible/books/{book_id}/chapters/{chapter_num}/generate (AI chapter generation, requires auth), POST /api/bible/ask (AI Q&A, requires auth), GET/POST/DELETE /api/bible/bookmarks (requires auth). Frontend at /bible with data-testid='bible-page'. Category chips: bible-cat-all, bible-cat-old-testament, bible-cat-new-testament, bible-cat-deuterocanonical, bible-cat-lost-apocryphal, bible-cat-torah-talmud, bible-cat-kabbalah, bible-cat-quran. Book cards: bible-book-{book-id}. Chapter reader has tabs: chapter-tab-retelling, chapter-tab-key_verses, chapter-tab-commentary. TTS: chapter-tts, Bookmark: chapter-bookmark, AI Chat: bible-ai-chat.

backend.GET /api/bible/categories: PASS - Returns 7 categories with correct book_count (total=136)
backend.POST /api/bible/ask: PASS - Returns AI answer to question
backend.auth_required_endpoints: PASS - generate, ask, bookmarks all require authentication

frontend.bible_page_loads: PASS - data-testid='bible-page' with title 'Sacred Scriptures & Lost Books'
frontend.category_chips_visible: PASS - All 7 category chips visible with correct counts
frontend.category_filtering: PASS - Clicking category chip filters book grid
frontend.book_cards_clickable: PASS - Book cards open chapter grid
frontend.chapter_grid: PASS - Shows all chapters for selected book
frontend.chapter_reader: PASS - Displays AI-generated content with tabs
frontend.navigation_menu: PASS - Sacred Scriptures link in Explore menu (data-testid='nav-item-bible')

ai_integration.provider: OpenAI GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key
